pr.title: Bandit: ClownCar Crawler x Cubric Ngram9 — 0.4961 BPB, 9.9mb

output.summary: Pairs a Frugendorff ClownCar crawler with shared 3D Cubric n-gram oracle plus complementary training/entropy-based alpha to exploit oracle corrections before int6 quantization.
techniques: Frugendorff ClownCar crawler (4 flat + crawler loops) with loop-aware GPTQ and late-start EMA
Shared 3D Cubric oracle over orders 2-9 with entropy-adaptive alpha and complementary training
GPTQ int6 quantization with zstd packing under 10MB
